texto: Henry Lloyd was with Darrow when they toured the mine. It was a dreadful experience, Lloyd said, "like a foretaste of the inferno.""You might as well get used to it," Darrow told him. Heaven was reserved for Wall Street financiers. Infidels like themselves would be rooming with Satan.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a John A. Farrell: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Henry Lloyd was with Darrow when they toured the mine. It was a dreadful experience, Lloyd said, …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, clarence-darrow, corruption pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de corruption e wall-street.

frase_original: Henry Lloyd was with Darrow when they toured the mine. It was a dreadful experience, Lloyd said, "like a foretaste of the inferno.""You might as well get used to it," Darrow told him. Heaven was reserved for Wall Street financiers. Infidels like themselves would be rooming with Satan.
